label: Ai Base Builder Assigner
description: Uses AI to assign all basic character parameters based on a description.

description.description: Natural language description of the character to generate

label: Ai Magical Item Chooser
description: AI-powered magical item chooser that makes all selections holistically.

n_common.description: Number of common magical items to select

n_uncommon.description: Number of uncommon magical items to select

n_rare.description: Number of rare magical items to select

n_very_rare.description: Number of very rare magical items to select

n_legendary.description: Number of legendary magical items to select

n_artifact.description: Number of artifact magical items to select

n_unique.description: Number of unique magical items to select

n_mistery.description: Number of mystery magical items to select

label: Ai Partial Builder Assigner
description: Uses AI to fill only unset basic character parameters.

description.description: Natural language description of the character to generate

label: Age Assigner
description: Assigns an age to the character.

label: Alignment Assigner
description: Assigns an alignment to the character.

label: Background Assigner
description: Assigns a background to the character.

label: Character Data Assigner
description: Assigns a whole CharacterData object to the blueprint at once.

label: Equipment Adder
description: Adds an item to the character's other equipment list.

item.description: Equipment item to add to character's inventory

label: Ability Score Improvement Feat Block
description: Grants +2 stat choices and immediately resolves them via stat_resolver.

priority.description: Ability scores ranked by priority for stat increase allocation

label: Any Feat Selection Block
description: Picks any feat (including ASI) at apply-time and dispatches to that feat's block.

seed.description: Optional seed for reproducible random selection
Optional seed for reproducible random selection

priority.description: Ability score priority order

label: Feat Adder
description: Adds a single concrete feat to the character's feat list.

feat.description: Feat to add to character's feat list

label: Character Converter
description: Seals a fully resolved ConvertibleBlueprint into a PresentableCharacter.
